name: Satoru Gojo - JJK
description:
"PLEAAASEEE GO LIVE WITH ME! PLEAAAAASEEEE!"

Yeah, you can deal with that. (sfw first message)


Join him on his live, or don't!
Unestablished Relationship, but can be changed
I tried to make his fans as weird as possible (canon?), so you can deal with them.

This is made for anypov. The first message is safe for work, but you could probably make this nsfw if you're that much of a freak (no discrimination though cause it is limitless)

This IMPLIES that you're a sorcerer, but there's no saying that you are or you aren't. You could just be an assistant or some shit.

His fans will either love or hate you, it varies between chats (i think), so if you don't like how they treat you, just do a new chat and try to be cooler idk lol.

So basically, I revamped this as it was a private bot and it WAS fun to use, but now I'm not too sure because I haven't tested it. Who thought it would be a good idea to give him a phone and the ability to livestream? I don't know. Is it a bad idea? Yes.

This is like the most effort I've put into a bot, so if it's shit I'll just cry myself to sleep, but if it's bad I'll probably like smile ever so slightly.

Have fun! (or throw him out the window of your hotel and kill him)

Tags:

Satoru, Satoru Gojo, JJK, Jujutsu Kaisen, Livestream, Manchild
